titleStmt.title: SII 22.35: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 35. (A.R. No. 35 of 1906) TANJAVUR DISTRICT, MAYURAM TALUK, TIRUKKAḌAIYŪR. AMṚITAGHAṬĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. TRIBH. RĀJĀDHIRĀJADĒVA (II)—3rd. YEAR (A.D. 1165-6)

summary.p: This records a similar provision for burning 5 perpetual lamps in the temple, three by one Tirayaṉ Tiruvālandūraiyuḍaiyāṉ of Ēmappēṟūr in Ēmappēṟūr-nāḍu a division of Nāḍuvil-nāḍu alias Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, and one each by two other persons one of whom was a native of Puriśai-nāḍu in Maṇaviṟ-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇdaśōḻa-maṇḍalam and the other of Naḍār in Pāmbūr-nāḍu in Uyyakkoṇḍārvaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ śrīrājādhirājadevarkku yāṇṭu mu ṉṟāvatu naṭuvilnāṭāna rājarājavaḷanāṭṭu Emappeṟūrnāṭṭu Emappeṟūr muḷḷuḻān Arayan tiruvālantuṟai Uṭaiyān tiruviḷakkuppuṟamāka Erukkāṭṭuc ceriyil kallit tiruttuvitta nilattāl Ikkoyilil Eriyun tirunantāviḷakku muṉṟu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu maṇa—
viṟkoṭṭattup puricaināṭṭup piccima tirukkaḻippālai Uṭaiyān tiruviḷakkup puṟamāka Erukkāṭṭucceriyil kallit tiruttuvitta nilattāl Ikkoyilil Eriyum tirununtāviḷakku Oṉṟu Uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭu pāmpurnāṭṭu naṭāril naṭār kiḻān celvan coṟaṉāna
ciṟuttoṇṭan Eṟṟiṉa tiruviḷakku Onṟu .
Digital edition of SII 22.35 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
